topic.question: Starting today, area residents have the rare opportunity to enter a contest to name what new acquisition by the Maryland Zoo?

question.question: Starting today, area residents have the rare opportunity to enter a contest to name what new acquisition by the Maryland Zoo?
question.explanation: The Maryland Zoo has welcomed two red pandas recently, one a mature red panda female named Aurora, and a juvenile female still waiting for the perfect name, which fans can address by entering a naming contest / fundraiser starting today.

9987af583ae2827eaa0a8e7b.draftEmail:
Aliza — looks like you're making a habit of showing up in the Daily Dispatch Quiz! After featuring your piece on the Tesla driver who ran over animals back in June, today we used your Maryland Zoo red panda naming contest story as one of our questions at dailydispatchquiz.com. Hope you'll give it a play and maybe share it with your readers — always fun when the reporter whose story inspired the question takes a crack at it!

David Conn, editor of the Daily Dispatch Quiz
